titleStmt.title: SII 19.375: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 375. (A.R. No. 432 of 1918.) TIRUKKURUGĀVŪR, SIRGALI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, VĒḶVIḌAINĀTHA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tiruveḷḷaḍai-Aṇḍār at Tirukkurugāvūr. The donor's name is lost. A few shepherds who received the sheep agreed to supply ghee by turns.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟki yāṇṭu patinañcāvatu tirukkurukāvūr tiru veḷḷaṭai Āṇṭārkku vaitta nontāviḷakku Oṉṟināl cāvāmuvāpperāṭu toṇṇūṟu It toṇṇūṟu Āṭṭinnāl vanta ney toṇṇūṟu nāḻi
yum Aṟa Inṉey can=tirādittavaṟ Iviḷakku A n kaṭava viḷakku 2 kurukāvūr Ārūrannaṭikaḷākiya manṟā viḷakku 2 kurukāvūr maṉṟāṭi nāraṇa kuṇacilan kaṭava 1 viḷakku 1 karukāvūr man koṟṟannākiya paṭalai kaṭava viḷakku 1 kurukāvūr manṟāṭi kaṭaiyan peruvaḻi kaṭava viḷa
kku Ivaraiy narupa nilan yān kaṭava viḷakku 1 kurukāvūr manṟāṭi nāraṇan Iṅkamayan kaṭava viḷakku 1 .
Digital edition of SII 19.375 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
